constraints.layout_style: table rows with inputs in td cells

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element

reference_templates.title: SVG icon labels
reference_templates.notes: Label contains SVG icon; accessible name via aria-labelledby only

SVG icon labels

Full name

reference_templates.title: Aria-label only
reference_templates.notes: No visible labels; fields use aria-label exclusively

reference_templates.title: Search type for name
reference_templates.notes: Name field uses input type=search instead of text

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Reference DOM (SVG icon labels): Label contains SVG icon; accessible name via aria-labelledby only Reference DOM (Aria-label only): No visible labels; fields use aria-label exclusively Reference DOM (Search type for name): Name field uses input type=search instead of text Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: iframe-apply, custom-combobox, aria-labelledby-hidden, readonly-prefill, aria-label-only. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: table rows with inputs in td cells. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: SVG icon labels; Aria-label only; Search type for name.
